expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜的板材尺寸。[宽度]、[高度]、[深度] 是整体尺寸，[板厚度] 是顶部、底部和侧板材料的厚度，[背板厚度] 是背板材料的厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] เป็นการวัดโดยรวม, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุด้านบน, ด้านล่างและด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước tấm gỗ cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày của vật liệu bảng trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày của vật liệu bảng sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang sukat ng board para sa isang kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang pagsukat, [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal para sa Itaas, Ibaba, at Gilid na Board, [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal para sa Likod na Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: မီးဖိုခန်းအိမ်ရိုးရေးအတွက် အိမ်ကြမ်းများကိုတွက်ချက်သည်။ [လျှောက်ရေး], [အမြင့်], [အနက်] သည် လုံးချင်းတူဇတ်များဖြစ်ပြီး, [တံခါးရြှပ်] သည် တန်ခုိးရန်ထဲက သက်တမ်းရေတွက်မှုဖြစ်သည် (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាទំហំច្រកសម្រាប់កាបូប។ [ធំ], [បញ្ជូលបន្ថែម], [ភ្ចាប់ជម្រិត] គឺជាការវាស់ទំហំសរុប; [ធំ] គឺជា ទទឹងសរសៃសន្លឹក; [ត្រយ៉ាក] គឺទឹកកកស៊ីនិងជាន់ខាងក្រោម; [ដែកត្រាស់] គឺជាគ្រឿងរចនាសម្ព័ន្ធ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະໜາດແຜ່ນດຽວສໍາລັບຕູ້. [ຄວາມກວ້າງ], [ຄວາມສູງ], [ຄວາມລືມ] ເປັນຂະໜາດລວມ, [BoardThick] ຄືຄວາມໜາຂອງແຜ່ນລາຍ, [BackBoardThick] ຄືຄວາມໜາຊື່ງປະຍາການ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットの板材サイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth] は全体の寸法、[BoardThick] は天板、底板および側板の材料の厚さ、[BackBoardThick] は背板の材料の厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛용 판재 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 측정값이고, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 판재의 두께이며, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 판재의 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un armario. [Width], [Height], [Depth] son medidas totales, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material del tablero superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material del tablero trasero. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les tailles de planches pour un meuble. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont des mesures totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des planches supérieure, inférieure et latérales, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind Gesamtabmessungen, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platte, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückenplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप है, [BoardThick] ऊपरी, निचले और पार्श्व बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] बैकग्राउंड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Расчет размеров досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] — это общие размеры, [BoardThick] — толщина материала верхней, нижней и боковых панелей, [BackBoardThick] — толщина материала задней панели. (AI translated, please check)
